'''鈭歽-sh-r''' ('''yashara''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:email|email]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-sh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:email|email]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-sh-r
|-
! Lemma
| yashara
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yasharithi|yasharithi]] || [[word:yashariji|yashariji]] || [[word:yasharishi|yasharishi]] || [[word:yashari|yashari]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yasharuthuth|yasharuthuth]] || [[word:yasharujuj|yasharujuj]] || [[word:yasharushush|yasharushush]] || [[word:yashar|yashar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yasharuthu|yasharuthu]] || [[word:yasharuju|yasharuju]] || [[word:yasharushu|yasharushu]] || [[word:yasharu|yasharu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yasharufuth|yasharufuth]] || [[word:yasharufuj|yasharufuj]] || [[word:yasharufush|yasharufush]] || [[word:yasharuf|yasharuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yasharethe|yasharethe]] || [[word:yashareje|yashareje]] || [[word:yashareshe|yashareshe]] || [[word:yashare|yashare]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yasharothoth|yasharothoth]] || [[word:yasharojoj|yasharojoj]] || [[word:yasharoshosh|yasharoshosh]] || [[word:yashar|yashar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yasharotho|yasharotho]] || [[word:yasharojo|yasharojo]] || [[word:yasharosho|yasharosho]] || [[word:yasharo|yasharo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yasharofoth|yasharofoth]] || [[word:yasharofoj|yasharofoj]] || [[word:yasharofosh|yasharofosh]] || [[word:yasharof|yasharof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yashar忙th忙|yashar忙th忙]] || [[word:yashar忙j忙|yashar忙j忙]] || [[word:yashar忙sh忙|yashar忙sh忙]] || [[word:yashar忙|yashar忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yasharathath|yasharathath]] || [[word:yasharajaj|yasharajaj]] || [[word:yasharashash|yasharashash]] || [[word:yashar|yashar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yasharatha|yasharatha]] || [[word:yasharaja|yasharaja]] || [[word:yasharasha|yasharasha]] || [[word:yashara|yashara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yasharafath|yasharafath]] || [[word:yasharafaj|yasharafaj]] || [[word:yasharafash|yasharafash]] || [[word:yasharaf|yasharaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:yasharasha|yasharasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goyasharasha|goyasharasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiyasharasha|gokiyasharasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:yasharn眉sha|yasharn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goyasharnkn眉sha|goyasharnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiyasharn眉sha|gokiyasharn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yasharsh毛sha|yasharsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyasharnksh毛sha|goyasharnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyasharsh毛sha|gokiyasharsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yasharosha|yasharosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyasharnkrosha|goyasharnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyasharosha|gokiyasharosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yasharmusha|yasharmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goyasharnkmusha|goyasharnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyasharmusha|gokiyasharmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:yasharsherasha|yasharsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goyasharnksherasha|goyasharnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiyasharsherasha|gokiyasharsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:yasharngasha|yasharngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goyasharnkngasha|goyasharnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiyasharngasha|gokiyasharngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yasharyasha|yasharyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goyasharnkyasha|goyasharnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiyasharyasha|gokiyasharyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:yasharyamasha|yasharyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goyasharnkyamasha|goyasharnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiyasharyamasha|gokiyasharyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:yasharn眉sh毛sha|yasharn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyasharnkn眉sh毛sha|goyasharnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyasharn眉sh毛sha|gokiyasharn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yasharn眉rosha|yasharn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyasharnkn眉rosha|goyasharnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyasharn眉rosha|gokiyasharn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yasharn眉musha|yasharn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyasharnkn眉musha|goyasharnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyasharn眉musha|gokiyasharn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:yasharsh毛n眉sha|yasharsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyasharnksh毛n眉sha|goyasharnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyasharsh毛n眉sha|gokiyasharsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yasharsh毛rosha|yasharsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyasharnksh毛rosha|goyasharnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyasharsh毛rosha|gokiyasharsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yasharsh毛musha|yasharsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyasharnksh毛musha|goyasharnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyasharsh毛musha|gokiyasharsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:yasharon眉sha|yasharon眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyasharnkron眉sha|goyasharnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyasharon眉sha|gokiyasharon眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:yasharosh毛sha|yasharosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyasharnkrosh毛sha|goyasharnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyasharosh毛sha|gokiyasharosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yasharomusha|yasharomusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyasharnkromusha|goyasharnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyasharomusha|gokiyasharomusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:yasharmun眉sha|yasharmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyasharnkmun眉sha|goyasharnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyasharmun眉sha|gokiyasharmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:yasharmush毛sha|yasharmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyasharnkmush毛sha|goyasharnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyasharmush毛sha|gokiyasharmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yasharmurosha|yasharmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyasharnkmurosha|goyasharnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyasharmurosha|gokiyasharmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:yashar|yashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:y忙sh忙r|y忙sh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoyashar|hoyashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoy忙sh忙r|hoy忙sh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyashar|hohoyashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoy忙sh忙r|hohoy忙sh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉yashar|n眉yashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉y忙sh忙r|n眉y忙sh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉yashar|n眉n眉yashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉y忙sh忙r|n眉n眉y忙sh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂yashar|n茂yashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂y忙sh忙r|n茂y忙sh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂yashar|n茂n茂yashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂y忙sh忙r|n茂n茂y忙sh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luyashar|luyashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luy忙sh忙r|luy忙sh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyashar|luluyashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluy忙sh忙r|luluy忙sh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liyashar|liyashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liy忙sh忙r|liy忙sh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyashar|liliyashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliy忙sh忙r|liliy忙sh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koyashar|koyashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koy忙sh忙r|koy忙sh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyashar|kokoyashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoy忙sh忙r|kokoy忙sh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keyashar|keyashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:key忙sh忙r|key忙sh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyashar|kekeyashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekey忙sh忙r|kekey忙sh忙r]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
